evals.prompt: Make me a year-long pacing guide for 6th grade math, roughly 36 weeks.
evals.expected_output: A pacing guide placing verified Grade-6 CCSS math domains across ~36 weeks with assessment checkpoints, buffer days, and a coverage check — realistic totals.
assertions: Sequences units across ~36 weeks with realistic day/week totals
Uses real, verified Grade-6 CCSS math standards with full coverage (no gaps)
Includes assessment checkpoints and a coverage check

evals.prompt: I'm teaching a semester of high school biology — what order should I teach the units in and why?
evals.expected_output: A scope & sequence with units ordered by prerequisite logic, tied to real NGSS HS life-science standards, with a rationale for the sequence.
assertions: Orders units with explicit prerequisite-to-dependent rationale
Cites real NGSS high-school life-science standards
